model_specification_line: results = smf.wls("full_time_employed ~ treatment + C(birthyr) + C(year) + C(statefip) + sex + UNEMP + LFPR + DRIVERSLICENSES + EVERIFY + SECURECOMMUNITIES", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": analysis_df["statefip"]})
